overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character wading through a shallow desert river with palm trees and wooden structures, then transitioning via a fade to a sunlit ancient Egyptian harbor with marble architecture, decorated boats, and grand staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow rocky stream with palm trees and wooden fencing

events.description: camera transitions from close-up of rope-wrapped post to third-person view following the character
screen fades to black marking the end of the natural water scene

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water, moving downstream past rocks and vegetation toward open water

entered.detail: thick wooden post wrapped with heavy rope at the water's edge
rustic wooden fence lining the left bank of the stream
tall palm trees scattered along the distant shoreline
reddish-brown boulders emerging from the shallow water
arid desert hills and mountains visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow, clear stream surrounded by desert vegetation and palm trees. Wooden fencing lines the left bank while large rocks dot the water, and the camera follows from behind as the character moves through the gentle current toward an open body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor promenade with decorated boats and marble monuments

events.description: fade from black reveals bright ancient harbor with marble architecture and docked boats
character releases a falcon from their gloved hand which flies away into the sky
character begins ascending the grand marble staircase toward the monument

agents.ego_description: standing on the dock releasing a falcon, then walking along the harbor promenade and ascending the grand staircase

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the boats on the dock

entered.detail: large wooden vessel with green and gold trim, decorated with potted plants and white canopies
circular stone fountain with burning brazier on top
classical ancient architecture with columns and white stone facades
tall stone obelisk rising above the city buildings
classical marble statues on pedestals flanking the staircase
wide stone steps with geometric mosaic patterns leading upward
large sphinx monument at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bright ancient harbor where the character stands on a mosaic-tiled promenade beside elaborately decorated boats. After releasing a falcon, the character walks past marble statues and fountains before ascending a grand staircase toward a monumental sphinx, with classical architecture and an obelisk visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a secluded desert waterway into the opulent grandeur of an ancient Egyptian harbor. It begins with the camera trailing a character wading through a shallow, clear stream flanked by palm trees, desert vegetation, and rustic wooden fencing. As the character moves through the gentle current toward open water, the environment shifts into a bright, sunlit promenade featuring mosaic tiles and elaborately decorated boats. The scene then expands as the character releases a falcon and walks past marble statues and fountains, before finally ascending a grand staircase toward a monumental sphinx and a towering obelisk.
